description: Magic of misdirection and false reality - conjuring phantom images, weaving mirages, and cloaking truth in shadow.
abilities: A conjured phantom that looks, moves, sounds, and feels real. It patrols and tidies on its own, or is controlled to speak and fight as though truly alive.
Total invisibility cloaking everything worn and carried. Not even a shadow remains. The enchantment shatters the instant the hidden figure strikes, flickering back like a candle reigniting.
A tiny illusory bird keeping silent watch. It chirps telepathically the moment something specific happens: a door opening, a hand on the lockbox. It even rouses its master from sleep.
Small, whimsical effects: a flickering flame between fingers, distant applause, the smell of freshly baked pie, goosebumps on a stranger's neck. Limited only by imagination.
A grand illusion spanning a vast area. A shimmering oasis, a treasure hoard, a lumbering giant. The phantom loops endlessly but dissolves like morning fog at a touch.
A blooming flower with a watchful eye at its center, invisible to all but those the caster permits. It scouts around corners and into rooms, reporting back impressions.
A creature's deepest irritation read from its mind and conjured as a visible phantom. It taunts, mocks, steals hats, and hounds the victim, consuming all attention.
A vanishing heartbeat, then three identical figures appear in unison. Enemies guess blindly which is real. Each duplicate that takes a hit bursts apart like shattered glass.
